description: Style Notespykar's Summer Fest line comes up with all the trending styles this season. This top is a warm weather essential - style it over a white shirt or under a black blazer and look great either way. Product DetailsBlack V-neck top, has short sleeves and embroidered branding above the hemMaterial and Care96% viscose 4% elastaneHand wash coldFlat dry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
